mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sky_take_out.marketing_case_library ( dish_category, activity_type, channel, style, case_title, case_content, character_count, has_emoji, performance_score, usage_count, conversion_rate, compliance_notes, tags, status, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time ) VALUES ( #{dishCategory}, #{activityType}, #{channel}, #{style}, #{caseTitle}, #{caseContent}, #{characterCount}, #{hasEmoji}, #{performanceScore}, #{usageCount}, #{conversionRate}, #{complianceNotes}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateUser}, #{updateTime} )
